title: audit — permissions
description: Read-heavy permission surface. Audit rows are READ-only via the API (only the vendor observer creates them; only the purge job deletes them). Retention policies have CRUD gated by compliance-officer role + Enterprise entitlement. Every audit permission is compliance-officer-scoped — regular admins do NOT read audit trails by default.

permissions.name: audit.audits.viewAny
permissions.description: List audit rows in tenant. Compliance-officer scoped.

permissions.name: audit.audits.view
permissions.description: View a single audit row (redacted diff by default). Compliance-officer scoped.

permissions.name: audit.audits.reveal_raw_diff
permissions.description: Reveal raw old_values + new_values on an audit row. Reserved for regulator investigations. Writes a chain-of-custody row (meta-audit) on every reveal.

permissions.name: audit.audits.export
permissions.description: Request an audit export (DSAR, regulator, legal-hold). Requires audit_export entitlement (Medium+).

permissions.name: audit.retention-policies.create
permissions.description: Create a retention policy override (Enterprise, audit_retention_extended entitlement).

permissions.name: audit.retention-policies.update
permissions.description: Update a retention policy (retention_years, override_ends_at, override_reason).

permissions.name: audit.retention-policies.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete a retention policy. Resets retention_years to config default.

permissions.name: audit.audits.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant audit read for support + regulator investigation. Compliance-officer + on-call scoped on the platform_admin guard.

permissions.name: audit.audits.export
permissions.description: Cross-tenant regulator-shaped export from the platform plane. Enterprise-tenant regulator-issued investigations.

permissions.name: audit.audits.reveal_raw_diff
permissions.description: Platform-level reveal for cross-tenant investigations. Chain-of-custody row on every reveal.
